profiles.label: No Accessibility Requirements
profiles.description: Baseline operational track with no accessibility overlay applied.

profiles.label: Rollator
profiles.description: Mobility profile using a rollator and/or walking stick where recorded.

profiles.label: Wheelchair
profiles.description: Mobility profile using a wheelchair where recorded.

statuses.label: Suitable
statuses.description: Can be undertaken safely without a specific additional adjustment.

statuses.label: Suitable with Adjustments
statuses.description: Can be undertaken when the recorded adjustment is applied.

statuses.label: Partially Accessible
statuses.description: Some duties are suitable and others must be reallocated or avoided.

statuses.label: Provisionally Accessible
statuses.description: Likely suitable but dependent on a recorded outstanding assessment.

statuses.label: Not Suitable
statuses.description: Should not be allocated for this mobility profile.

statuses.label: Not Applicable
statuses.description: No allocated duty or not relevant to this record.

statuses.label: Review Required
statuses.description: Structured data was created but a human decision is still needed.

phases.label: Incoming
phases.description: Pre-show front-of-house duties before the house opens or as patrons arrive.

phases.label: Interval
phases.description: Interval duties, including sales, queues, doors, and patron movement.

phases.label: Outgoing
phases.description: Duties as patrons leave after the performance.

phases.label: Extra Tasks for Matinees
phases.description: Additional duties allocated for matinee performances.

phases.label: Standby / Evacuation Position
phases.description: Fire, standby, evacuation, or access-support position.

taskTypes.label: Access Support
taskTypes.description: Supporting access patrons or delegated access duties.

taskTypes.label: Bar Duty
taskTypes.description: Work based in or connected to a bar area.

taskTypes.label: Cleaning
taskTypes.description: Cleaning duties from track or cleaning schedules.

taskTypes.label: Clearance
taskTypes.description: Clearing seats, rooms, stairwells, or fire exits.

taskTypes.label: Directing / Greeting
taskTypes.description: Greeting, directing, door, queue, or customer-flow duties.

taskTypes.label: Evacuation / PEEP
taskTypes.description: Evacuation, standby, fire, or PEEP-related tasks.

taskTypes.label: Kiosk
taskTypes.description: Kiosk sales, setup, stock, or working-position duties.

taskTypes.label: Manual Handling
taskTypes.description: Carrying, lifting, moving, or bulky-load duties.

taskTypes.label: Merchandise / Selling
taskTypes.description: Selling or transporting merchandise, programmes, drinks, or ice creams.

taskTypes.label: Pick-up / Polycarb
taskTypes.description: Polycarb bucket, pick-up bag, or auditorium pick-up duties.

taskTypes.label: Restocking
taskTypes.description: Restocking bars, ice, fridges, bags, cellar stock, or displays.

taskTypes.label: Toilets
taskTypes.description: Toilet cleaning, checks, queueing, or access constraints.

taskTypes.label: Other
taskTypes.description: Operational task that does not fit another type.

Delfont Bar cleaning duties remain suitable where undertaken within the accessible bar area. PEEP Override applies.
trackAccessibility.requiredAdjustment: Track not suitable. Door C deployment, auditorium duties, Stalls Ladies' toilets, bins to street, standby position and clearance duties are not wheelchair accessible. Delfont Bar cleaning duties remain suitable where undertaken within the accessible bar area. PEEP Override applies.
